package rulefixtures

import (
	"sort"
)

// scenario for append_then_sort_each_iteration: Slice sorting observed inside loops - often cheaper to sort once after the loop.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario341Positive(values []string) string {
	for range values {
		sort.Sort(sort.StringSlice(values))
	}
	if len(values) == 0 { return "" }
	return values[0]
}
